tasks.description: Change my GitHub README.md file as it appears to be broken
Create README.md file of task-cli project, containing all of the useful commands needed to interact with my application
If the text is too long to display on my terminal, then the look of my task description gets messed up, what can I do in order to handle this issue?
Create a portfolio using CLI, I have actually seen that project in one of the youtube video and I found it very cool. So I would very much like to build it
